name: Archives Administration - Freelance at Bank Indonesia KPw Bali
description: Managed physical and digital archives by organizing, classifying, and verifying documents while supporting administrative operations through efficient archive retrieval and document distribution.

name: Software Developer - Internship at TaksuTech
description: Contributed to the development of an Internship Management System by analyzing system requirements, designing 10+ UI/UX interfaces in Figma, developing 40% of the system using Laravel Filament, and collaborating with the team throughout the project.

name: Technical Writer of Kasirbali.com - Point of Sale App
description: Developing comprehensive Software Requirements Specification (SRS) by collaborating with stakeholders to define functional and non-functional requirements, ensuring clear understanding of project scope and system behavior. Additionally, creating user-friendly manuals with step-by-step instructions, feature overviews, troubleshooting tips, and visual aids to help end-users operate the software efficiently, regardless of their technical background.

name: Technical Writer for Manajemen Basis Data (Teori dan Implementasi) Book
description: Authored an academic book titled “Manajemen Basis Data (Teori dan Implementasi)”, contributing to content development, formatting, and editing, while collaborating with a lecturer to ensure clarity, accuracy, and alignment with academic standards.

name: Himpunan Mahasiswa Jurusan Teknik Informatika - Journalistic Subfield
description: Production of information content related to students majoring in Information Technology and encourage and facilitate the improvement of literacy and writing skills among students through journalism training and scientific work.
